holdings.name: DLF Limited
holdings.description: India's largest real estate developer. ₹13,000+ Cr pre-sales in FY25 driven by luxury residences. DLF Cyber City (Gurugram) dominates Grade-A office leasing. Net debt largely cleared; entering a high-FCF phase.

holdings.name: LIC of India
holdings.description: World's largest insurer by policy count with 300M+ policies. India's largest institutional investor managing ₹45 lakh crore AUM. Benefiting from financialisation of savings — insurance penetration rising from 3.2% to target 5%.

holdings.name: Adani Green Energy
holdings.description: India's largest renewable energy company. 10 GW+ operational solar and wind capacity. 45 GW pipeline under development. Key beneficiary of India's 500 GW non-fossil target by 2030. Zero-carbon energy at scale.

holdings.name: HDFC Life Insurance
holdings.description: India's leading private life insurer. Protection + ULIP + annuity product mix. VNB margin 26%+; embedded value growing 15% annually. Direct and bancassurance channels driving consistent APE growth.

holdings.name: Shriram Finance
holdings.description: India's largest retail NBFC focused on used commercial vehicle and tractor loans. 3,000+ branches in semi-urban India. Post-merger of Shriram Transport, Capital and City Union entity. NIM ~8%; very profitable.

holdings.name: Indian Oil Corporation
holdings.description: India's largest fuel retailer and refiner. 35,000+ petrol pumps, 11 refineries. Expanding LPG, CNG and EV charging network. Strategically positioned at centre of India's energy distribution infrastructure.
